name: Racing Kings
author: AGP
description: A pawnless chess variant by V. R. Parton (1961): both kings race to the eighth rank. Pieces (K Q R B N) move as in orthodox chess, but there are no pawns, no castling and no en passant. Check is entirely forbidden -- you may neither move into check nor give check. The first player to land their king on the eighth rank wins; if White reaches it and Black immediately matches on the reply, the game is a draw.
